agent_doc: An Agent that echoes the received message back to the sender.

message_format_schema.description:
Notification message to indicate that the agent is ready to process messages.
This is sent to the agent itself.
message_format_schema.title: SelfReadyNotification

send_first_heartbeat.handler_doc:
Notification message to indicate that the agent is ready to process messages.
This is sent to the agent itself.

StateOwner.description: An enumeration of the owners of the state.
StateOwner.title: StateOwner

message_format_schema.description: A class to represent the the state of an agent or the guild.

state_owner.description: The owner of the state. The owner can be an agent or the guild.

guild_id.description: The ID of the guild from which the state was fetched.
guild_id.title: Guild Id

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent to which the state belongs. None if the state belongs to the guild.
agent_id.title: Agent Id

state.description: The state of the agent or guild. The structure of the state is defined by the agent or guild.
state.title: State

version.description: The version of the state. The version is incremented every time the state is updated.
version.title: Version

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the state. The timestamp is the time the state was last updated.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

state_path.description: The path on the state object that was read. None if the entire state object was read.
state_path.title: State Path

fetch_timestamp.description:
The timestamp of the state that was read.
        This is the timestamp of the state that was read, which may be different from the requested timestamp.
fetch_timestamp.title: Fetch Timestamp

is_latest.description: True if the state is the latest state, False otherwise.
is_latest.title: Is Latest

message_format_schema.title: StateFetchResponse

update_local_state.handler_doc: A class to represent the the state of an agent or the guild.

StateOwner.description: An enumeration of the owners of the state.
StateOwner.title: StateOwner

message_format_schema.description: A class to represent the response to a state update request.

state_owner.description: The owner of the state. The owner can be an agent or the guild.

guild_id.description: The ID of the guild to which the state belongs.
guild_id.title: Guild Id

agent_id.description: The ID of the agent to which the state belongs. None if the state belongs to the guild.
agent_id.title: Agent Id

state.description: The updated state of the agent or guild. The structure of the state is defined by the agent or guild.
state.title: State

version.description: The version of the state. The version is incremented every time the state is updated.
version.title: Version

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the state. The timestamp is the time the state was last updated.
timestamp.title: Timestamp

message_format_schema.title: StateUpdateResponse

update_local_state_on_update.handler_doc: A class to represent the response to a state update request.
